pokemon:raging-bolt.name: Raging Bolt
pokemon:raging-bolt.summary: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.

form:raging-bolt.name: Raging Bolt
form:raging-bolt.summary: Raging Bolt form with Electric / Dragon typing.
